en: I don't know what you think you're doing.
ko: 당신이 뭘 하고 있다고 생각하는지 모르겠어요.

en: I'm doing the sensible thing, the responsible thing.
ko: 저는 이성적인 선택을 하고 있어요, 책임감 있는 선택을.

en: If we're not careful, if I go on another 20, 25 years,
ko: 우리가 조심하지 않으면, 제가 또 20년, 25년을 더 간다면,

en: a tired, white-haired, geriatric Queen will hand over to a tired, white-haired, geriatric Prince of Wales.
Those are the rules. But if he were then to go on another 20, 25 years,
it would mean that for the next half century the British monarchy would be a very decrepit experience indeed.
Is that the right thing to do to the institution?
ko: 그게 그 기관에 대한 올바른 행동인가요?

en: Charles is in the prime of his life now.
Honestly, I've never heard so much nonsense. Have you forgotten the oath that you took?
ko: 솔직히, 이렇게 말도 안 되는 소리는 처음 들어요.

en: I declare before you all that my whole life, whether it be long or short,
ko: 저는 여러분 앞에서 선언합니다. 제 인생 전체,

en: shall be devoted to your service. You're fit enough to ride and drive, so you're fit enough to wear the crown.
ko: 당신은 말도 탈 수 있고 운전도 할 수 있으니, 왕관을 쓸 자격이 있어요.

en: You remember what Queen Mary told you?
ko: 메리 여왕이 당신에게 뭐라고 했는지 기억하나요?
